title: galeopsis tetrahit subsp. reichenbachii
intro: Galeopsis tetrahit subsp. reichenbachii, also known as Reichenbach's galeopsis, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is used in herbal medicine, where its leaves and flowers have been traditionally employed for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Reichenbach's galeopsis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural remedy for respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
